params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Version of the service to call. The current version is 1

params.name: format
params.description: Format of the response

params.name: callback
params.description: Specifies the jsonp callback method. Only used when format is jsonp

items.docs:
The Copyrights API returns copyright information for
the Maps API Raster Tile Service in JSON, JSONP, or XML format.
This call returns copyright information for the whole world.

params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Version of the service to call. The current version is 1.

params.name: format
params.description: Format of the response

params.name: callback
params.description: Specifies the jsonp callback method. Only used when format is jsonp

items.docs: This API returns copyright captions for the map service.

params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Version of the service to call. The current version is 1

params.name: format
params.description: Format of the response

params.name: minLon
params.description: Minimum longitude coordinate of bounding box defined in terms of latitude/longitude.

params.name: minLat
params.description: Minimum latitude coordinate of bounding box defined in terms of latitude/longitude.

params.name: maxLon
params.description: Maximum longitude coordinate of bounding box defined in terms of latitude/longitude.

params.name: maxLat
params.description: Maximum latitude coordinate of bounding box defined in terms of latitude/longitude.

params.name: callback
params.description: Specifies the jsonp callback method. Only used when format is jsonp.

items.docs:
The Copyrights API returns copyright information for
the Maps API Raster Tile Service in JSON, JSONP, or XML format.
This call returns copyright information for a specific bounding box.

params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Version of the service to call. The current version is 1

params.name: format
params.description: Format of the response

params.name: zoom
params.description:
Zoom level of tile to be rendered. Only used for tile-level
copyright calls.

params.name: X
params.description:
X coordinate of the tile on zoom grid. Only used for tile-level
copyright calls.

params.name: Y
params.description:
Y coordinate of the tile on zoom grid. Only used for tile-level
copyright calls.

params.name: callback
params.description: Specifies the jsonp callback method. Only used when format is jsonp.

items.docs:
The Copyrights API returns copyright information for
the Maps API Raster Tile Service in JSON, JSONP, or XML format.
This call returns copyright information for the a specific map tile.

params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Version of the service to call. The current version is 1.

params.name: layer
params.description: Layer of image to be rendered. Hybrid and labels are intended for layering with other data and are only available in png format.

params.name: style
params.description: Map style to be returned

params.name: format
params.description: Image format to be returned

params.name: zoom
params.description: Zoom level of map image to be returned.

params.name: center
params.description: Coordinates for the center point of the image. Must be used with the width and height parameters; cannot be used with bbox. Uses EPSG:3857 projection (functionally equivalent to EPSG:900910).

params.name: width
params.description: Width of the resulting image in pixels. Width must be a positive integer between 1 and 8192.

params.name: height
params.description: Height of the resulting image in pixels. Height must be a positive integer between 1 and 8192.

params.name: bbox
params.description: Bounding box for the image, using EPSG:3857 projection (functionally equivalent to EPSG:900910). Values must be in the order of minLon, minLat, maxLon, maxLat. MaxLat must be greater than minLat. Longitude values can be on both sides of the 180th meridian. Cannot be used with center, width, or height parameters.

params.name: view
params.description: Geopolitical view. Determines rendering of disputed areas. See the documentation for an explanation of how this works in live services.

items.docs:
The Static Image service renders a rectangular raster image
in the style, size, and zoom level specified. The image can be requested
using either a center point plus width and height or a bounding box.

params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Version of the service to call. The current version is 1.

params.name: layer
params.description: Layer of tile to be rendered. Hybrid and labels are intended for layering with other data and are only available in png format.

params.name: style
params.description: Style of tile to be rendered

params.name: zoom
params.description: Zoom level of tile to be rendered

params.name: X
params.description: x coordinate of tile on zoom grid

params.name: Y
params.description: y coordinate of tile on zoom grid

params.name: format
params.description: Format of the response.

params.name: tileSize
params.description: Tile dimensions in pixels. 512 is only available for the main style and basic or labels layers.

params.name: view
params.description: Geopolitical view. Determines rendering of disputed areas. See the documentation for an explanation of how this works in live services.

items.docs: The Maps API Raster Service delivers raster tiles, which are representations of square sections of map data.

params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Version of the service to call. The current version is 1

params.name: layer
params.description: Layer of tile to be rendered

params.name: style
params.description: Style of tile to be rendered

params.name: zoom
params.description: Zoom level of tile to be rendered

params.name: X
params.description: x coordinate of tile on zoom grid

params.name: Y
params.description: y coordinate of tile on zoom grid

params.name: view
params.description: Geopolitical view. Determines rendering of disputed areas. See the documentation for an explanation of how this works in live services.

params.name: language
params.description: Language to be used for labels in the response. The default is NGT: Neutral Ground Truth, which uses each place's local official language and script (where available). See the documentation for a full list of options.

items.docs: The Maps API Vector Service delivers vector tiles, which are representations of square sections of map data.

params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Version of the service to call. The current version is 1

params.name: request
params.description: Request type

params.name: srs
params.description: Projection used in describing the bbox EPSG:3857 is recommended, particularly at higher zoom levels. (Note that EPSG:3857 is functionally equivalent to EPSG:900913/EPSG:3785)

params.name: bbox
params.description: Bounding box in the projection stated in srs (minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat)

params.name: width
params.description: Width of the resulting image, in pixels Maximum value is 2048

params.name: height
params.description: Height of the resulting image, in pixels Maximum value is 2048

params.name: format
params.description: Image format to be returned

params.name: layers
params.description: Map layers requested Currently only the basic layer is available

params.name: styles
params.description:
Map styles to be returned. Currently, no styles are available. This
parameter is present for forward compatibility; it must be used and
left blank.

params.name: service
params.description: Service type

params.name: version
params.description: WMS service version

items.docs:
The GetMap call implements the Web Map Service 1.1.1 standard
to access TomTom raster map tiles. This service is described
in the response to the GetCapabilities API call.

params.name: version
params.description: WMS service version

items.docs:
The GetCapabilities call is part of TomTom's implementation of version 1.1.1
the Web Map Service (WMS). It provides descriptions of the other calls
that are available in the implementation.

params.name: versionNumber
params.description: Version of the service to call. The current version is 1

params.name: key
params.description: Your API key for calling this service.

items.docs: The WMTS GetCapabilities call implements version 1.0.0 of the Web Map Tile Service (WMTS) standard. It returns metadata that allows compatible calling systems to construct calls to TomTom's raster map tile service. See the documentation for more information on WMTS.
